Error.description: Error is returned when a handler encounters an error. It contains a simple error message that the developer can customize.

message.description: Error message (e.g., 'user not found', 'database connection failed')

FieldViolation.description: FieldViolation describes a single validation error for a specific field.

description.description: Human-readable description of the validation violation (e.g., 'must be a valid email address', 'required field missing')

field.description: The field path that failed validation (e.g., 'user.email' for nested fields). For header validation, this will be the header name (e.g., 'X-API-Key')

webcamId.description: Webcam identifier to resolve into image and player URLs.

boundE.description: Eastern longitude bound of the map viewport.

boundN.description: Northern latitude bound of the map viewport.

boundS.description: Southern latitude bound of the map viewport.

boundW.description: Western longitude bound of the map viewport.

zoom.description: Map zoom level used to decide whether to return webcams or clusters.

UnauthorizedError.description: Returned when the API key is missing, malformed, or lacks current API access.

ValidationError.description: ValidationError is returned when request validation fails. It contains a list of field violations describing what went wrong.

ApiKeyHeader.description: Alias header for the WorldMonitor API key (X-WorldMonitor-Key).
ApiKeyHeader.name: X-Api-Key

parameters.description: Webcam identifier to resolve into image and player URLs.
parameters.name: webcam_id

parameters.description: Map zoom level used to decide whether to return webcams or clusters.
parameters.name: zoom

parameters.description: Western longitude bound of the map viewport.
parameters.name: bound_w

parameters.description: Southern latitude bound of the map viewport.
parameters.name: bound_s

parameters.description: Eastern longitude bound of the map viewport.
parameters.name: bound_e

parameters.description: Northern latitude bound of the map viewport.
parameters.name: bound_n
